subject: [PATCH v2] mm/migrate_device: document folio_get requirement before frozen PMD split

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with Acked-by, no specific technical comments.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a comment to mm/migrate_device.c explaining the relationship between folio_get() and split_huge_pmd_address() when freeze=true, ensuring that the expected folio reference count is maintained.
